system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_phieuxuat_cancel3","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE TR_PHIEUXUAT_CANCEL3(@sopx nvarchar(50))
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @idPhieuXuat int;
	DECLARE @id_pyc_chitiet uniqueidentifier;
	DECLARE @id_chitiet_dathang int;
	DECLARE @id_chitiet_lcp int;
	DECLARE @batchNo nvarchar(50);
	DECLARE @mavt nvarchar(200);
	DECLARE @soluong decimal(18, 5);
	DECLARE @makho nvarchar(50);

	DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT A.id, A.id_pyc_chitiet, A.id_chitiet_dathang, A.id_chitiet_lcp, A.BatchNo, A.mact, A.soluong 
		FROM tr_ctphieuxuat A
		WHERE A.phieuxuat = @sopx
	OPEN CUR;
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @idPhieuXuat, @id_pyc_chitiet, @id_chitiet_dathang, @id_chitiet_lcp, @batchNo, @mavt, @soluong;
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @makho = dbo.ufn_GetWHSMaterial(@mavt);

		-- CẬP NHẬT LẠI SỐ LƯỢNG, TRẠNG THÁI CỦA PHIẾU ĐỀ XUẤT
		IF @id_pyc_chitiet IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			UPDATE tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet
			SET soluong_daphat = soluong_daphat - @soluong
			WHERE id = @id_pyc_chitiet

			UPDATE tr_phieuyeucau
			SET IsFinish = 0
			WHERE id = (SELECT TOP 1 phieuyeucau_id FROM tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet WHERE id = @id_pyc_chitiet)
		END

		-- CẬP NHẬT LẠI SỐ LƯỢNG, TRẠNG THÁI CỦA ĐƠN ĐẶT HÀNG (HỦY PHIẾU XUẤT TRẢ NHÀ CUNG CẤP)
		IF @id_chitiet_dathang IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			UPDATE tr_dondathang_chitiet
			SET sl_danhan = sl_danhan + @soluong,
				sl_conlai = sl_conlai - @soluong
			WHERE id = @id_chitiet_dathang
		END

		-- CẬP NHẬT LẠI SỐ LƯỢNG, TRẠNG THÁI CỦA LỆNH CẤP PHÁT
		IF @id_chitiet_lcp IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			UPDATE tr_lenhcapphat
			SET soluong_daphat = soluong_daphat - @soluong,
				soluong_conlai = soluong_conlai + @soluong,
				capphat = 0
			WHERE id = @id_chitiet_lcp

			UPDATE tr_lenhcapphat_head
			SET hoanthanh = 0
			WHERE LenhCapPhatID = (SELECT TOP 1 LenhCapPhatID FROM tr_lenhcapphat WHERE id = @id_chitiet_lcp)
		END

		IF @batchNo IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			UPDATE StockBalances
			SET Quantity = Quantity + @soluong
			WHERE WarehouseCode = @makho AND MaterialCode = @mavt AND BatchNo = @batchNo
			-- SELECT * FROM StockTransaction
			INSERT INTO StockTransaction 
			(
				TransactionDate, SourceType, SourceId, 
				WarehouseCode, MaterialCode, BatchNo, 
				Quantity, UnitPrice, CreatedBy, Note
			) VALUES (
				GETDATE(), 'RTN_OUT', @idPhieuXuat,
				@makho, @mavt, @batchNo, @soluong, 0,
				'admin', N'hủy phiếu xuất kho ' + @sopx
			)
		END

		UPDATE tr_tonkho_sum
		SET soluong = soluong + @soluong
		WHERE makho = @makho AND mavt = @mavt

		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @idPhieuXuat, @id_pyc_chitiet, @id_chitiet_dathang, @id_chitiet_lcp, @batchNo, @mavt, @soluong;
	END
	CLOSE CUR;
	DEALLOCATE CUR;

	UPDATE tr_phieuxuat
	SET active = 0
	WHERE sopx = @sopx
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_lenhcapphat","dbo.tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet"],"writesTables":["dbo.stockbalances","dbo.stocktransaction","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_lenhcapphat","dbo.tr_lenhcapphat_head","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_phieuyeucau","dbo.tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
